title: Design System: Mahbod Tavassoli — Visual Artist & AI Creative

display.purpose: Hero name. Section titles. Max two per page.

label.purpose: Mono uppercase metadata. Section eyebrows, years, technical credit.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default for state transitions. Type reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Reactor-fill, hard-edged, mono-uppercase label. Used once per page maximum.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ff3d00; color: #0c0a09; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 16px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #cc3100; color: #f4ecdf; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff3d00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Pitch surface with 1px Reactor outline. Default secondary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: #0c0a09; color: #f4ecdf; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 15px 31px; border: 1px solid #ff3d00; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #ff3d00; color: #0c0a09; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff3d00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Color-block visual on top, type below. Hard edges. No shadow. No lift on hover.
components.html:
01
Architectural Mapping2024

Alireza
Ghorbani

Large-scale architectural video mapping for major live concert.

Live Concert
components.css: .ds-card { width: 420px; background: #0c0a09; color: #ece3d4; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-card-visual { background: #ff3d00; height: 280px; position: relative; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), filter 0.6s; } .ds-card-num { position: absolute; top: 16px; left: 16px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; color: #0c0a09; font-weight: 600; } .ds-card-body { padding: 24px 0 0; } .ds-card-meta { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #a99a87; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 0.92; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: #f4ecdf; margin: 0 0 12px; transition: letter-spacing 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card-desc { font-weight: 300; font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #a99a87; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-client { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ff3d00; } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-visual { transform: scale(0.98); filter: brightness(1.05); } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-title { letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Pitch surface, Iron border, no radius. Heavier than browser default.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #766858; } .ds-input { background: #0c0a09; color: #f4ecdf; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; padding: 14px 18px; border: 1px solid #4e463c; border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-width 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #766858; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #ff3d00; border-width: 2px; padding: 13px 17px; }

components.name: Label (Mono Eyebrow)
components.description: Mono uppercase metadata. Section eyebrows, years, client tags, footer credits.
components.css: .ds-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #766858; }

components.name: Custom Cursor Label
components.description: 96px Reactor disc with Pitch text inside. The cursor IS the affordance.
components.css: .ds-cursor { position: relative; width: 96px; height: 96px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ff3d00; color: #0c0a09; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; mix-blend-mode: difference; }

components.name: Brand Tile (Collaborations)
components.description: Editorial grid cell for client names. Inverts to Reactor on hover.
components.css: .ds-brand { padding: 32px 24px; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: #0c0a09; cursor: default; transition: background 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-brand span { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; color: #f4ecdf; transition: color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-brand:hover { background: #ff3d00; } .ds-brand:hover span { color: #0c0a09; }

narrative.overview: A portfolio that reads as the workshop, not the showroom. The viewer is standing inside the studio at the hour after the work is finished and before it is cleaned up. Concrete underfoot. Cables. Ember of a soldering iron. A printed reference taped to the wall. The site has the temperature of a place where things are actually made, not a brochure printed about them. Built around three commitments: warm-pitch dark (never neutral, never pure), one reactor-orange accent that earns every appearance, and mechanical & weighted component shapes — right-angled, heavy, made of one decisive material per surface.
keyCharacteristics: Warm-pitch dark by default; tinted toward the reactor-orange hue.
Single accent. The orange occupies <10% of any frame.
Zero rounded corners. Hard edges only.
Type does the heaviest lifting; the 3D scene is a peripheral accent.
Flat surfaces. No shadows. Depth comes from typographic weight and color blocks.
Generous, irregular whitespace. Same gap everywhere would be a SaaS tell.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Reactor is used on ≤10% of any rendered frame, measured in pixels not elements. It announces; it never decorates.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: No #000 or #ffffff. Every neutral pulls toward the Reactor hue with chroma 0.005–0.015.

rules.name: The No-Gradient Rule
rules.body: Color shifts are categorical, not gradient. Gradient anywhere — text, background, button — is the polished-luxury trap.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Display and Label may share one composition. Display + Headline + Body + Label is one too many.

rules.name: The Tracking Rule
rules.body: Display tracks negative to feel compact and heavy. Label tracks wide to read as machine-printed signage.

rules.name: The Single Italic Ban
rules.body: No italics anywhere. Emphasis comes from scale, weight, or color shift to Reactor — never slant.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Hover and focus respond with color shift or outline, never with box-shadow.

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: No bloom, no soft glow, no rgba shadow-with-blur for premium feel. The studio's light is hard.

dos: Do keep Reactor under 10% of any rendered frame. Measured in pixels, not elements.
Do tint every neutral toward the Reactor hue (chroma 0.005–0.015). Never reach for #000 or #fff.
Do make components feel mechanical and weighted. Right-angled corners. Heavy padding. No lift on hover.
Do let the type carry the hero. The 3D monolith is peripheral.
Do vary spacing rhythm intentionally. Section gaps of 120px, internal gaps of 24-48px, micro detail at 8-16px.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: kill scroll-linked parallax, 3D idle motion, split-text reveals, marquee scrolls.
Do preserve focus rings. Reactor outline at 2px, offset 2px, always visible.
donts: Don't introduce a second saturated color. Reactor is alone.
Don't use gradients — for backgrounds, for text, for buttons, anywhere.
Don't use border-radius greater than 0. Hard edges only.
Don't add box-shadow to anything. Surfaces are flat.
Don't make components float on hover. They are heavy.
Don't stack identical project cards in a 3-column grid. Cargo / Wix tell.
Don't caption every project with marketing prose. Name the client, state the medium, state the scale.
Don't introduce em dashes. Use commas, colons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't treat the 3D scene as the centerpiece.
Don't ship a futuristic neon / cyber / glitch decoration.
Don't use lifestyle photography, serif display headlines, or champagne/gold accents.
Don't build About / Work / Contact as the literal anatomy.
